column1: We release security updates for the following versions:
We take the security of HELPDESK.AI seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please report it to us as described below.
**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**
Instead, please report them via email to the project maintainer:
- **Contact Method**: Email security concerns to [ritesh1908@example.com](mailto:ritesh1908@example.com) (replace with actual security contact)
- **Response Time**: We will acknowledge receipt of your report within **48 hours**.
- **Information Required**: Please include the following details in your report:

- **Coordinated Disclosure**: We follow a coordinated disclosure process. We request that you allow us **90 days** from the time of reporting to address the vulnerability before any public disclosure.
- **Embargo Period**: We maintain a 90-day embargo period to allow time for a fix to be developed and deployed.
- **Update Frequency**: Security patches are released as needed based on severity (Critical, High, Medium, Low).
- All production systems and code within the HELPDESK.AI repository
- Third-party services and dependencies (report issues to respective maintainers)
- **Bug Bounty**: We do not currently operate a formal bug bounty program.
- **Acknowledgement**: Valid security researchers who report vulnerabilities will be acknowledged in our Hall of Fame (upon request).
- **Terms**: By participating in security research, you agree to comply with all applicable laws and regulations.
- **Safe Harbor**: We will not pursue legal action against individuals who:
- Make a good-faith effort to comply with this policy
- Do not exploit vulnerabilities beyond what is necessary to demonstrate the issue
- Do not access or modify data beyond what is necessary to demonstrate the issue
